description_long: This object is a simplified, abstract doll figure with a smooth, elongated body and a featureless, rounded head. The surface is uniformly white, with no visible facial features, clothing details, or painted decorations. The arms are subtly indicated as slight protrusions along the sides of the torso, blending seamlessly into the body. The legs are not distinctly separated, giving the lower half a monolithic, tapered appearance. The overall form is minimalist, with gentle curves and no sharp edges, suggesting it may be carved from a single piece of material. The lack of intricate details or color variation gives it a modern, stylized look.
description: A minimalist, white doll with a smooth, elongated body and a featureless, rounded head. The form is abstract and lacks detailed facial or clothing features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full, smooth face and torso, with subtle arm outlines and a tapered lower body.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated profile and the gentle curve from head to base, with minimal arm definition.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a continuous, unbroken surface with faint lines where arms meet the body.
description_view_3: Angled top view emphasizes the rounded head and the seamless transition to the body, with no visible facial or clothing details.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll is a single, unadorned form with no garment details, patterns, or colors.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly extended along the sides and legs together, forming a continuous, static silhouette.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present; the face is completely smooth and blank.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and featureless.
